arts.ttl: Saint-Étienne predicted XI v Angers: Eirik Horneland rings changes
arts.sum: AS Saint-Étienne’s slide into the bottom three has left them in desperate need of a victory ahead of hosting Angers SCO tonight. Only three points separate the club from safety…
